title: Payroll
description: A frontend-only payroll application shell — collapsible sidebar and a tabbed workspace over 11 screens, composed from WorkspaceUI's payroll blocks. Runs on mock data with no backend.
features: Collapsible app sidebar with icon-rail mode
Tabbed workspace — open screens accumulate as tabs you can switch and close
Light and dark theming out of the box (next/font, no-flash init)
11 screens covering the full payroll workflow
Frontend-only with mock data — no backend or persistence
Static export — deploy the built `out/` anywhere
